opportunities.title: [HIRING] Content contributors for a new social app, $20, must have iPhone
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Content contributors for a new social app, $20, must have iPhone

I’m looking to hire 50 fluent written English people to help seed text content in a new iPhone social app built around AskReddit-style questions. You will: 1- Answer 15 prompts (text) 2- Write 5 meaningful comments 3- Like 10 responses Your answers must: • Be original and based on your genuine opinions or experiences • Be written in fluent, natural English • Give enough detail to be interesting when the prompt calls for it • Generally be around 2–5 sentences, although naturally short answers are acceptable for some prom

opportunities.description:
